text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allāh, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Sabbaha lillaahi maa fis amaawaati Wa-maa fil ardi Wa-huwal 'Azeezul Hakeem

text: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?
tl: Yaa-ayyuhal lazeena aamanoo lima taqooloona maa laa taf'aloon

text: Greatly hateful in the sight of Allāh is that you say what you do not do.
tl: Kabura maqtan 'indal laahi an taqooloo maa laa taf'aloon

text: Indeed, Allāh loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.
tl: Innal laaha yuhibbul lazeena yuqaatiloona fee sabeelihee saffan ka-annahum bunyaanum marsoos

text: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when Moses said to his people, \"O my people, why do you harm me while you certainly know that I am the messenger of Allāh to you?\" And when they deviated, Allāh caused their hearts to deviate. And Allāh does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
tl: Wa-iz qaala Moosa liqawmihee yaa-qawmi lima tu'zoonanee Wa-qat ta'lamoona annee Rasoolul laahi ilaikum falammaa zaaghooo azaaghal laahu quloobahum; wallaahu laa yahdil qawmal faasiqeen

text: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, \"O Children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allāh to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Aḥmad.\" But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, \"This is obvious magic.\"
tl: Wa-iz qaala 'Eesab nu Maryama yaa-Banee Israaa'eela innee Rasoolul laahi ilaikum musaddiqal limaa baina yadayya minat Tawraati Wa-mubashshiram bi-Rasooliny yaatee mim ba'dis muhooo Ahmad; falammaa jaaa'ahum bil-baiyinaati qaaloo haazaa sihrum mubeen

text: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allāh untruth while he is being invited to Islām. And Allāh does not guide the wrongdoing people.
tl: Wa-man azlamu mimma-nif taraa 'alal laahil kaziba Wa-huwa yad'aaa ilal Islaam; wallaahu laa yahdil qawmaz zaalimeen

text: They want to extinguish the light of Allāh with their mouths, but Allāh will perfect His light, although the disbelievers dislike it.
tl: Yureedoona liyutfi'oo nooral laahi bi-afwaahihim wallaahu mutimmu noorihee Wa-law karihal kaafiroon

text: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allāh dislike it.
tl: Huwal lazee arsala Rasoolahoo bilhudaa Wa-deenil haqqi liyuzhirahoo 'alad deeni kullihee Wa-law karihal mushrikoon

text: O you who have believed, shall I guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment?
tl: Yaaa-ayyuhal lazeena aamanoo hal adullukum 'alaa tijaaratin tunjeekum min 'azaabin aleem

text: [It is that] you believe in Allāh and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allāh with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you only knew.
tl: Tu'minoona billaahi Wa-Rasoolihee Wa-tujaahidoona fee sabeelil laahi bi-amwaalikum Wa-anfusikum; zaalikum khairul lakum in kuntum ta'lamoon

text: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.
tl: Yaghfir lakum zunoobakum Wa-yudkhilkum Jannaatin tajree min tahtihal anhaaru Wa-masaakina taiyibatan fee Jannaati 'Adn; zaalikal fawzul 'Azeem

text: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allāh and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.
tl: Wa-ukhraa tuhibboonahaa nasrum minal laahi Wa-fat-hun qareeb; Wa-bashshiril mu-'mineen

text: O you who have believed, be supporters of Allāh, as when Jesus, the son of Mary, said to the disciples, \"Who are my supporters for Allāh?\" The disciples said, \"We are supporters of Allāh.\" And a faction of the Children of Israel believed and a faction disbelieved. So We supported those who believed against their enemy, and they became dominant.
tl: Yaaa-ayyuhal lazeena aamanoo koonooo ansaaral laahi kamaa qaala 'Eesab nu Maryama lil-Hawaariyyeena man ansaareee ilal laah; qaalal Hawaariyyoona nahnu ansaa-rul laahi fa-aamanat taaa'ifatum mim Bannee Israaa'eela Wa-kafarat taaa'ifatun fa-ayyadnal lazeena aamanoo 'alaa 'aduwwihim fa-asbahoo zaahireen
